/usr/bin/ar qc libminidfs.a CMakeFiles/minidfs.dir/dfs/file_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidfs.dir/dfs/minidfs_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidfs.dir/dfs/minidfs_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidfs.dir/proto_src/minidfs.grpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/minidfs.dir/proto_src/minidfs.pb.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminidfs.a
